# Rheumify

> ABIM rheumatology board prep and clinical education from Dr. Alison Bays, MD, MPH&TM, an academic rheumatologist with 10+ years in clinical practice, medical education, and research. Rheumify offers an affordable question bank, spaced-repetition flashcards, free clinical tools, and evidence-based guides for fellows and recertifying physicians.

## Board prep
- [How to Study for the ABIM Rheumatology Board Exam](https://www.rheumify.org/rheumatology-board-prep): Full guide to exam content, study timing, spaced repetition, recommended resources, and current first-time pass rates (92% in 2025).
- [For Rheumatologists & Fellows](https://www.rheumify.org/fellows): Board-prep resources, exam format, pass rates, and the Rheumify study app (500+ questions, 300+ flashcards).

## Tools (free)
- [ScriptSwap citation formatter](https://www.rheumify.org/tools/scriptswap): Convert PMIDs, DOIs, and URLs into Vancouver, APA, AMA, and other citation styles.

## About
Rheumify was created by Dr. Alison Bays, MD, MPH&TM, an academic rheumatologist. Content is written and clinically reviewed by a named rheumatologist and mapped to the ABIM rheumatology blueprint. Pricing is kept deliberately low ($15/month or $119/year) for fellows.
